news.title: Bitcoin miner and AI firm Ionic Digital files for Nasdaq direct listing
news.summary: Bitcoin miner and AI infrastructure firm Ionic Digital filed on Monday to go ‌public through a direct listing.  The company was formed ‌in January 2024 to acquire the cryptocurrency mining assets of Celsius ​Mining, a subsidiary of Celsius, which received U.S. bankruptcy court approval for a restructuring in November 2023.  A direct listing allows a company to list its existing shares on an ‌exchange without an ⁠underwritten offering.

news.title: Tesla (TSLA) Teams With Sunrun And Renew Home On A 16 Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant
news.summary: Tesla, Sunrun, and Renew Home have agreed to combine residential batteries, rooftop solar, and smart devices into a nationwide virtual power plant. The alliance targets more than 16 gigawatts of flexible capacity for utilities and large data and AI operators across the U.S. The partnership aims to use existing home energy assets to support grid reliability while creating new revenue streams for participating households.
